title: Simply Swords Reforged
description: Its a resource pack that will change models of all unique weapons from Simply Swords mod to make them Epic and 3D!
body:
# Simply Swords Reforged
Changes Weapons from Simply Swords mod into epic fantasy 3D modelled counterparts!

---
Take Note that this pack if fully dependend on [Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords) mod
meaning you need it installed for the pack to work!
It also means pack only works on any minecraft version Mod itself is updated to.

---
![picture showing examplonary weapons and what it does](https://i.ibb.co/mGsDWSB/Mainpage.png)

Pack is still work in progress and will be updated along with updates of the mod itself!

[![discord](https://i.ibb.co/W0NNg6K/discord.png)](https://discord.gg/GmKrkXAY83)
